topic: Enterprise customer feature requests — Q2 roadmap

messages.text: Dropping the consolidated feature request list from enterprise customers this quarter. Top three themes: (1) bulk CSV export for order history, (2) role-based access controls within an org, (3) API rate limit increase for automated integrations.
CSV export is already on the backlog — probably Q3. RBAC is a bigger lift, Q4 at the earliest. Rate limit increase we can look at sooner, maybe next sprint.
The rate limit one is coming from Meridian Technologies and GlobalTech Solutions specifically. Both are running automated syncs and hitting the 1,000 req/hour cap.
@Priya Patel can you take a look at the rate limiter config and see what it would take to offer a tiered limit for Enterprise accounts? Let's say 5,000 req/hour as an enterprise option.
I'll investigate and have an estimate by Thursday. The rate limiter is Redis-based so adding a tier should be straightforward — main concern is documenting it in the API docs.
That would be huge. Let's make sure the enterprise tier rate limit is communicated in the next customer newsletter.
